text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Encounter Records RIFs Codebook │ May 2025 │ V 1.7 116 

SAMPLE_GROUP 

LABEL: CCW Beneficiary Random Sample Group 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates if the beneficiary is part of a random 1, 5, 15, or 20 percent sample of 
Medicare beneficiaries that the CCW creates using standard CMS processes. All associated 
encounter records for the sampled beneficiaries are identified in the encounter files. 

SHORT NAME: SAMPLE_GROUP 

LONG
